subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! In this moment when heart and soul are stirred to their depths by the glad-tidings of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء در این دم که قلب و جان در نهایت هیجانست و بشارات ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love and unity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
